name: Professor X
description: Professor Charles Francis Xavier is the world's most powerful telepath and the founder of the X-Men. Born into wealth and privilege, Xavier chose to dedicate his life to the dream of peaceful coexistence between humans and mutants. From his School for Gifted Youngsters, he trains young mutants to control their abilities and fight for a world that fears and hates them. His telepathic abilities allow him to read minds, project thoughts, and control the actions of others across global distances using Cerebro.
